title: Soft Touch Foil Printed Blue Taggie Comforter Stars Design with Satin Back
features: Supersoft satin baby comforter. Satin touch lining 100% Polyester. Gorgeous mixed taggies around edge that baby's love to feel. Each side has four colour co-ordinating taggies on in a mixture of textures that baby will love to feel.
Soft touch taggie comforter baby comfort blanket with sensory tags and bubble / heart / star / foil print pattern Dimple
The comforter measures approx. 35cm x 35cm and comes in either White, Red, Cream, Pink, Grey or Blue.
description: From the brand Previous page Gentle Comfort for Little Ones Since 1986, Soft Touch has pioneered safe, stylish, sustainable babywear. Every product is designed in the UK and meets rigorous testing standards, free from harmful substances and safe for your baby. Our decades of experience have perfected the balance between adorable design, practical functionality, gentle care for your baby's delicate skin and our planet while keeping it affordable for parents. The Hidden Compromise: When parents choose inferior babywear, they face challenges they didn't bargain for... Emotional Challenges: Worry about harsh chemicals irritating their baby's delicate skin Disappointment when adorable outfits quickly lose shape or fade Regret over wasted money on items that don't last Practical Challenges: Dealing with scratchy fabrics that cause discomfort Managing complicated fastenings during midnight changes Experiencing shrinkage, pilling, and color fading after just a few washes Discovering poor stitching that unravels at critical moments Your Trusted Partner EST. 1986 We Understand: As parents ourselves, we've experienced the same challenges you face. The midnight changes, the sensitive skin concerns, the desire to provide the very best without breaking the bank—we've been there too, and have been guiding parents like you for over 35 years. Explore Our Collections: Browse our thoughtfully designed ranges for newborns and infants, including our innovative ZERO sustainable line. Choose with Confidence: Select products knowing each one meets strict safety standards and is designed for both baby's comfort and parent's convenience. Watch Them Grow: Experience the durability difference as your Soft Touch products maintain their quality through growth spurts, hand-me-downs, and countless washes. Wrap Your Baby in Kindness Shop our collection today and experience the difference to your baby's comfort, and your peace of mind.
